title: ctenium planifolium
intro: Ctenium planifolium, also known as Flat Blush or Flat Panic Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ctenium planifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and soothe irritated skin and mucous membranes. In traditional herbal preparations, Ctenium planifolium is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
